title: IMP-0029 ARCHITECTURE tracks block
description: ARCH's parallelization tracks, emitted as a fenced JSON/YAML block in ARCHITECTURE.md. QB's DEV fan-out and fanout-setup.ps1 depend on this parsing — a failed parse is a gate-bounce to ARCH.

name.description: Track name; becomes the track/<name> branch (IMP-0033).

owned_paths.description: Path prefixes this track owns exclusively.

env_contract.description: Environment variables this track consumes or produces.

depends_on.description: Names of tracks that must complete first (future task-DAG use).
